title: calophyllum utile
intro: Calophyllum utile, also known as the Camphor tree or Beeswax tree, is a plant species found in the tropical forests of Southeast Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Calophyllum utile include its ability to treat various health conditions such as wounds, skin infections, and digestive issues, as well as its potential to reduce inflammation and improve immune function. In herbal preparations, the plant's leaves and bark are often used to make teas, infusions, and topical creams, which are used to treat various health conditions.
